_comment: Bonus 'Give the agent a shell' lab — command policy.
The agent may run shell commands on YOUR machine to do what you ask.
Everything is ALLOWED by default. These two lists are the guardrails:
deny  — these never run; the agent is told they were blocked and must adapt.
ask   — these pause and wait for you to click Allow or Deny in the Live tab.
'rm'            → matches when the FIRST word of the command is rm
'git push'      → matches when the command STARTS WITH 'git push'
'*rm -rf*'      → glob: '*' matches anything, matched against the whole command
Edit these lists and re-run — no restart needed.
